offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed payment confirmations cause cash flow gaps. We aggregate invoice payment confirmations and send weekly summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 accounting firms with demo
Community forums for accounting tools and tips
try_it: Let users try weekly summary reports and manual entry for missing confirmations
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
